instruction:
The general solution of the difference equation $\Delta y_{t}=t$ is $y_{t}=()$.

Options:
A. $\frac{} {} 3t \left( t+1 \right)+C$, where $\left( C \right)$ is an arbitrary constant.
B. $\frac{1} {2} t \left( 3t+1 \right)+C$, where $\left( C \right)$ is an arbitrary constant.
C. $\frac{1} {2} t \left( t+2 \right)+C$, where $\left( C \right)$ is an arbitrary constant.
D. $\frac{1} {2} t \left( t+1 \right)+C$, where $\left( C \right)$ is an arbitrary constant.
E. $\frac{1} {2} t \left(2 t-1 \right)+C$, where $\left( C \right)$ is an arbitrary constant.
F. $\frac{1} {2} t \left( t-2 \right)+C$, where $\left( C \right)$ is an arbitrary constant.
G. $\frac{1} {2} t \left( t-1 \right)+C$, where $\left( C \right)$ is an arbitrary constant.
H. $\frac{} {} t \left( t+1 \right)+C$, where $\left( C \right)$ is an arbitrary constant.
I. $\frac{} {} t \left(2 t-3 \right)+C$, where $\left( C \right)$ is an arbitrary constant.
J. $\frac{1} {2} t \left(2 t-3 \right)+C$, where $\left( C \right)$ is an arbitrary constant.
